name: vortexjob-scheduler
description: VortexJob - Distributed Job Scheduler with Glassmorphic Dashboard and DAG support

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api,worker,web" -c "magenta,cyan,blue" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
